data.title: Preventive Maintenance and Repair Services for HVAC Systems
data.office: VA Palo Alto Health Care System (VAPAHCS)
data.placeOfPerformance: VA Palo Alto Health Care System — Palo Alto, Menlo Park, and Livermore campuses
data.summary: Request for proposals for preventive maintenance and repair services for approximately 450 HVAC units across three VA Palo Alto Health Care System campuses. Requires EPA Section 608 certified technicians, 2-hour emergency response, and compliance with VA Directive 7078. Total SDVOSB set-aside.

data.overview: Comprehensive HVAC preventive maintenance and repair services for 450 units across three VA hospital campuses, including chillers, AHUs, VAV boxes, package/split systems, cooling towers, and BAS interfaces.

requirements.description: Monthly PM inspections per manufacturer specifications for 450 HVAC units
Emergency repair response: 2-hour on-site for Palo Alto, 4-hour for satellite locations
EPA Section 608 Universal Certification for all technicians
Compliance with VA Directive 7078 (HVAC Maintenance Standards)
VA PIV card background checks for all on-site personnel
Experience with Johnson Controls Metasys BAS

incumbentInfo.notes: No incumbent contractor identified in the solicitation.

risks.description: NAICS 238220 (Plumbing/HVAC) — completely outside IT services capability
Requires EPA Section 608 certified HVAC technicians — not in current workforce
SDVOSB set-aside — requires service-disabled veteran-owned certification
Physical on-site service at three California locations

redFlags: Industry mismatch — HVAC maintenance is not IT services

data.narrativeSummary: No relevant past performance — company specializes in IT services, not HVAC maintenance.
data.gapAnalysis: Complete capability gap. HVAC maintenance and repair services are outside the company's industry and service offerings.

criteria.name: TECHNICAL_FIT
criteria.rationale: HVAC maintenance is entirely outside IT services capabilities. NAICS 238220 is a different industry.

criteria.name: PAST_PERFORMANCE_RELEVANCE
criteria.rationale: Zero relevant past performance in HVAC, mechanical systems, or facilities maintenance.

criteria.name: PRICING_POSITION
criteria.rationale: Cannot competitively price HVAC services — no cost basis, workforce, or supply chain.

criteria.name: STRATEGIC_ALIGNMENT
criteria.rationale: Physical facility maintenance does not align with IT services strategy.

criteria.name: INCUMBENT_RISK
criteria.rationale: No incumbent identified, but industry mismatch makes this irrelevant.

blockers: Complete industry mismatch — HVAC maintenance is not IT services
data.summaryJustification: This is an HVAC maintenance contract completely outside the company's IT services capabilities. Not a viable opportunity.
data.decisionRationale: NO_GO due to complete industry mismatch. NAICS 238220 (Plumbing/HVAC) bears no relation to IT consulting.
data.confidenceExplanation: Very high confidence in NO_GO — the industry mismatch is unambiguous.

data.strategy: Not applicable — industry mismatch prevents competitive pricing.
pricingRisks: No cost basis for HVAC services
